steps.description: Probe level analysis was performed on the Affymetrix raw data (.cel files) with the robust multichip average (RMA) method implemented in the Bioconductor package 'aroma.affymetrix' to obtain a log2 expression value for each gene probe set

raw_text: Probe level analysis was performed on the Affymetrix raw data (.cel files) with the robust multichip average (RMA) method implemented in the Bioconductor package 'aroma.affymetrix' to obtain a log2 expression value for each gene probe set
